warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees (landscape scan of 2 pages of the ปร.4 BOQ book, same convention as house 02's equivalent pile-footing BOQ). Source must be rotated 90 degrees COUNTER-CLOCKWISE to read normally; after that rotation, the physical RIGHT half of the original landscape image becomes the TOP block (this sheet, 1/21) and the LEFT half becomes the BOTTOM block (sheet 2/21, extracted separately as _2.json). Rotation direction was empirically verified by rotating both ways and confirming which produces upright, readable Thai text.

This is the pile-foundation (ฐานรากเสาเข็ม) BOQ variant for this house ('บ้านครอบครัวไทยร่วมสมัย แบบที่ 3'), confirmed by the printed title on this cover sheet and by the 'เสาเข็มหกเหลี่ยมกลวง' pile line item appearing under หมวดงานโครงสร้าง on sheet 2/21.

All quantity/price cells on this cover sheet are blank in the original document - only category labels and the 'รวม' unit placeholder are printed, matching the pattern seen on house 02's equivalent cover sheet (หน้า59_1.json).

doc_page=73 read directly from the printed page-number footer '73' at the bottom-center of the original (unrotated) source PNG, confirming the doc_page = png_page - 2 relationship used across this whole 21-sheet BOQ book (pages 75-85).
